description: CompositionWhite polo neck short sleeved t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with ribbed collar, has graphic print on the front with embroidery, snap buttons on the placket, yellow and green fabric tape on the inseam of the collar, appliqued ferrari badge on the left sleeve and brand logo embroidered on the right sleeveFittingRegularWash care Gentle machine wash in cool water at 30 degrees Do not bleach Tumble dry at low temperature Warm iron Do not dry clean If you eat, sleep, breathe Formula One, and  Felipe Massa is your guru, this white polo neck tee from puma is your ideal companion. Zoom through life in this Massa t-shirt, bearing the colors of the Brazilian flag: green and yellow. Team it with jeans or chinos to get a look worth killing for!Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
